_comment_reporting_day: Monday = forward planning (Phase S). Tuesday = data update folded into the weekly-reporting run (DD settled): reporting tabs + Experiments readings/Data-thru stamped for the just-closed Mon-Sun week.
_comment_location_aliases: Maps freeform campaign-export location labels to the canonical store names in the sales sheet's By Location 2.0 tab, so per-location marketing-spend-% joins.

portfolio_guardrail.note: tiers are %-based; portfolio must stay balanced at <=6% blended

tier_strategy.reorder_rates: CANONICAL = May 8 2026 analysis (Notion 35ad3ff0…): portfolio 74.5% blended, retention-rich. Jun 12 capture INVALIDATED (truncated exports, n=1-63, contradicted by May 8 full pulls). Quarterly re-confirm; next at Aug re-tier incl. BH 30d-post-reopen + NYC 60-90d reads
tier_strategy.holiday_scheme: MDW precedent (May 22-25): Spend $20 Save $5 portfolio-wide CA, all customers, ~11x blended. Repeat July 4 wknd + Labor Day wknd.

client_forecast.owner: Kelly Burke (client) — shared 2026-06-12, edit access; we READ ONLY, never write
client_forecast.cadence: per fiscal period (P7 incoming); total-year forecast outdated per Kelly (BH closure + NYC)
client_forecast.caveat: WHOLE-RESTAURANT net sales (lunch+dinner, all channels incl 1P) — NOT directly comparable to our 3P Total Sales levels; use trajectory/YoY direction + demand notes (school calendars), not levels

p6_reads.shape: every store declines W1→W5 (~-15-25%); trough = July 4 week — forecasted demand dip, aligns with clean-baseline exclusion
p6_reads.note: client PRICES IN Robertson/Larchmont declines — beating her forecast = defense success bar

threeP_share.validated: portfolio reconciliation W23(=P6W1): our 3P $1,455K / Kelly whole-restaurant $1,751K = 83% — confirms our 'Total Sales' IS 3P-only and the 75-80% holds (we run slightly hot of it)
threeP_share.caveat: single-week (W23) per-store ratios are noisy; portfolio 83% is the solid number. Refine to L4W. >100% stores = beating her total forecast OR she's conservative; confirm over P7.
